name: Lexar 800x PRO UHS-I SDXC Memory Card
description: Designed for point-and-shoot cameras, mid-range DSLR cameras, and HD camcorders, the High-Performance 800x PRO UHS-I SDXC Memory Card (BLUE Series) from Lexar features a storage capacity and takes advantage of the UHS-I bus to let you quickly capture and transfer 4K.

features.Key Features:: 64GB Capacity | UHS-I / V30 / U3 / Class 10 | Max Read Speed: 150 MB/s | Min Write Speed: 30 MB/s | Records Full HD, 3D, and 4K Video | Shock / Vibration / X-Ray Proof | Can Withstand Temperature Extremes | Built-In Write Protect Switch
